scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});require('fs').rmSync('../../../node_modules/.cache/jue/examples',{recursive:true,force:true})" && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=dist/index.js --sourcemap && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
